description: A designed DHS recruitment/event-promo graphic in a landscape format on a blue background. On the left is an angled-frame stock photo of two business-attired colleagues (a man in a suit and a woman) looking together at a folder/documents. On the right, large bold white text reads 'WE ARE HIRING.' Below it is the DHS seal next to the event logo 'DHS CAREER EXPO' (with 'EXPO' stylized large). Event details in yellow/white text: 'June 27-28, 2024 | 10 am - 6 pm ET' and 'Dulles Expo Center | Chantilly, VA.' A small tagline at bottom-right reads 'Join DHS. Make an impact.' This is a federal-hiring recruitment advertisement promoting the DHS Career Expo job fair; target audience is prospective job applicants. Produced under the prior administration.
notable_text: WE ARE HIRING; DHS CAREER EXPO; June 27-28, 2024 | 10 am - 6 pm ET; Dulles Expo Center | Chantilly, VA; Join DHS. Make an impact.
